introduccion.p1: Complete solution for hotels and demanding spaces
introduccion.p2: We design, manufacture and install bespoke solutions, meeting FR/Outdoor regulations and delivering just in time.

destacado.p1: A fully integrated service covering surveying, manufacturing and installation. Delivered by one dedicated team with full accountability.
destacado.p2: FR/IMO-certified, outdoor-ready fabrics with high Martindale performance under the HARBOUR brand. Fully compliant with UNE, DIN, BS, and IMO standards.
destacado.p3: Precise planning aligned with site requirements, just-in-time delivery and dedicated on-site supervision, ensuring everything runs exactly as expected.

team.heading: TEAM
team.p1: Driven by continuous improvement, precision in execution, and a commitment to flawless results, our team of professionals travels worldwide to deliver and install bespoke solutions for every project.
team.p2: Each project is a new challenge, an opportunity to learn, refine our expertise and demonstrate our agility and commitment.
team.p3: We operate as one unified team, where every member plays a vital role. From the earliest stages of manufacturing through to final installation, every step is guided by passion for our craft and respect for one another.

department.heading: DEPARTMENT
department.p1: In 2008, we launched a dedicated division focused on hotel fit-out. Over time, and through a wide range of projects, we have professionalised and streamlined our made-to-measure operations by investing in advanced machinery and continuous team training.
department.p2: Built on a foundation of premium tailoring and just-in-time delivery, we established our own in-house installation team. Our goal is to shape each space by interpreting and bringing to life the essence of every design concept.

projects.heading: Key Projects
projects.p1: The majority of our work focuses on themed restaurants and 4- and 5-star hotels, led by some of the most renowned design studios in Spain and worldwide.
projects.p2: Boutique hotels in cities such as Berlin, Córdoba, Lisbon, London, Madrid, Marbella, Rome and Seville, as well as large-scale hotels in Cancun, Punta Cana and Jamaica.

fabrics.heading: Exclusive On-Demand Fabrics
fabrics.p1: We develop fabrics tailored to the specific regulations of each project, including UNE, DIN, BS or IMO standards. All fabrics are available under our HARBOUR brand, offering a wide range of fire-retardant and outdoor textiles.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.p1: If you have any questions or would like further information about our services, please don’t hesitate to contact us. We will be happy to assist you.
contact.subject: CJM Contract
